name: Cornerstone OnDemand API
what_it_does: Cornerstone OnDemand REST API for enterprise talent management and learning platform. Enables AI agents to manage learning assignments, track completions and certifications, retrieve talent data, integrate performance reviews, and connect Cornerstone into HRIS and HR workflow automation. Cornerstone is a leading enterprise HCM platform covering LMS, performance, recruiting, and succession.
use_cases: Assigning and tracking mandatory compliance training from HR automation agents
Retrieving employee learning history and certification data from compliance agents
Integrating Cornerstone talent data into HRIS and payroll workflow agents
Querying performance review and goal data from talent analytics agents
not_for: SMB companies without enterprise HCM needs
best_when: A large enterprise using Cornerstone wants AI agents to automate compliance training, track certifications, and integrate learning and talent data into broader HR technology stacks.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Employee talent, performance, and learning data is highly sensitive HR data. Requires data processing agreements per GDPR and employment law compliance.

auth.notes: Cornerstone API uses OAuth 2.0 with client credentials. App registration in Cornerstone Edge Marketplace. Enterprise access required. Scopes cover different CSOD modules.

pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise HCM platform with modular pricing
pricing.notes: Enterprise HCM platform. Large company typical customer. API included with enterprise subscription.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API client; not publicly documented

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Employee talent, performance, and learning data requires strict access controls
No public MCP server — OAuth2 REST API through Edge Marketplace
Cornerstone API is complex — covering LMS, Performance, Recruiting, and Succession modules
API documentation quality varies by module; some older modules have limited docs
Data model is complex; understand CSOD's organizational hierarchy before integration
FedRAMP authorization makes this suitable for US government agency deployments
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Highly sensitive employee HR data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR, FedRAMP. OAuth2 with module-level scopes. EU data residency.

security_score_components.security_notes: Employee HR and talent data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR, FedRAMP. OAuth2 with scopes.
